home.subtitle: World Cup 2026 Prediction Game
home.description: The best online prediction game for the 2026 World Cup. Enter your picks, build your group with friends or coworkers, and follow every match live.

steps.title: Sign up
steps.desc: Create your account with your email and password. You'll be ready to play in under a minute.

steps.title: Enter your picks
steps.desc: Predict the result of each match before it starts. You can edit them up to 15 minutes before kick-off.

steps.title: Build your group
steps.desc: Create a private group and invite friends, family, or coworkers with a unique code or link.

steps.title: Follow the tournament
steps.desc: Check the live leaderboard with your group's podium and compete for the title of Prediction King.

faqs.q: What is Prediction King and how does it work?
faqs.a: Prediction King is the online platform for the 2026 World Cup prediction game. You predict the result of each match, accumulate points based on your accuracy, and compete in real time against your group. You can play solo or create a private group with friends, family, or coworkers.

faqs.q: Can I play the 2026 World Cup prediction game for free?
faqs.a: Yes, the Free plan is 100% free forever. It allows up to 25 players per group, with no subscription or credit card required. For larger groups there is the Pro plan (up to 50 players, one-time payment) and the Business plan (up to 150 players, ideal for companies and corporate events).

faqs.q: How do I organize a prediction game for my company or workplace?
faqs.a: With the Business plan you can create a World Cup prediction group for up to 150 participants. Upload your logo and customize the banner with your company's identity. It's the ideal solution for corporate groups or company events during the 2026 World Cup.

3 points for an exact result (e.g., you predicted 2-1 and it ended 2-1). 2 points for the correct winner and goal difference (predicted 3-1, ended 2-0: same winner, same difference). 1 point for just the correct winner or draw. 0 points for a wrong prediction. You can also pick the World Cup Champion before the tournament: if correct, you earn 10 extra points in every group where you made that choice.

faqs.q: Until when can I enter my predictions?
faqs.a: You can enter or edit predictions until 15 minutes before each match starts. After that the pick is locked. If you don't enter a prediction for a match, that match is worth 0 points.

faqs.q: What is a private group and how do I invite friends?
faqs.a: A private group is a closed group where you compete only with the people you invite. When you create the group you receive a unique 6-character code and an invitation link to share. Each group has its own leaderboard, podium, and prizes section the admin can customize.

faqs.q: Can I join multiple groups at the same time?
faqs.a: Yes. With a single account you can join as many private groups as you want — the office one, the friends one, the family one. Your predictions are applied to all of them automatically.

Yes. Prediction King is available in English and Spanish and can be used from anywhere in the world. The platform is designed for global teams and corporate clients. For enterprise inquiries, contact us and we'll tailor the experience to your region and needs.

faqs.q: Are my predictions visible to other players?
faqs.a: Not until the match starts. While the match hasn't kicked off, only you can see your picks. Once the match begins, all group members' predictions become visible for real-time debate and tracking.

config.nameHint: If empty, the default group name is used.
config.descPlaceholder: E.g. The official World Cup 2026 prediction game for Encompass Digital Media.
config.descPlaceholderEn: E.g. The official World Cup 2026 prediction game.
config.logoHint: Format: PNG with transparent background · Ideal ratio: square (1:1) or landscape (2:1) · max 5MB
config.bannerHint: Format: JPG or PNG · max 5MB · Ideal ratio: 3:1 (e.g. 1200×400px)
config.regionalDesc: When enabled, a regional ranking and a private ranking per region are shown in the group. Requires assigning a region to each player from the Players tab.
